title: MT Bard Instruments
description: A small mod that adds tools for bards, items are obtained from different species
body:
![logo](https://i.imgur.com/MwmuB8W.png)

* It's nothing extraordinary, it's just a small mod that adds 10 new musical instruments. Here's a little more about them.
*All instruments have their own distinctive varied sound and particles
* Sound Effect from pixabay.com
* Many thanks to sweat hart for the support <3
* All links to my social networks can be found here [https://megatrex4.netlify.app/](https://megatrex4.netlify.app/)

# Recipes may change during development, so it is recommended to use REI or EMI

### Lute
<details>
<summary>Click me!</summary>


![Lute](https://i.imgur.com/PZ1DWBf.png)

has crafting recipe

![Lute](https://imgur.com/uezMZsm.png)

if you press Shift+r-click, you can change the mode, shooting and playing.

Deals 2.5 health damage.

Strikes with it break faster, unbreaking reduces the damage caused by hits.
</details>


### Violin
<details>
<summary>Click me!</summary>


![Violin](https://i.imgur.com/3elEMzL.png)

To get it, you have to kill the Ender Dragon

if you press Shift+r-click, you can change the mode, shooting and playing.

Deals 5 health damage.

Strikes with it break faster, unbreaking reduces the damage caused by hits.
</details>


### Bandoneon
<details>
<summary>Click me!</summary>


![Bandoneon](https://i.imgur.com/wZudcOy.png)

Can be obtained from the villager Leather Worker, after receiving Hero of the Village

</details>



### Brass Whistle
<details>
<summary>Click me!</summary>


![Brass Whistle](https://i.imgur.com/WUQmM1E.png)

Can be obtained from the villager in Novice Level with Tool Smith

</details>
